Hi Emma — I checked your calendar for 2024-05-19.

Conflict found:
- 10:00–11:00 — Project Kick-off (confirmed)
- 11:00–11:30 — One-on-One with Manager (confirmed)

So 10:00 is not available. The earliest 1‑hour slot that day is 11:30–12:30. Other possible 1‑hour options: before the kick-off (09:00–10:00) or later in the afternoon (for example 13:00–14:00). 

Before I create the event, quick clarifications:
1. Which time do you want me to schedule if 10:00 is unavailable? (Prefer 11:30–12:30, 09:00–10:00, 13:00–14:00, or another time?)
2. Who should be invited? (Provide emails or say “no additional participants”.)
3. Title for the meeting? I can use “Follow-up Meeting” or “Follow-up to Project Kick-off”.
4. Short description to include — I can use a draft such as: “Follow-up to Project Kick-off — review action items and next steps.” OK to use that?

Once you confirm these, I’ll create the one‑hour event for 2024-05-19.
